c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C1: LiveMode raise in Initialize; status_fields strings PAUSED / BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; no broker/exchange/wallet/api adapter in imports
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C2: engine-truth run_id; Initialize date cross-check; window ceiling check; plan_doc_sha256 = canonical seal of this phase2_plan.json
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C3: all universal + futures-specific counters tracked; unique-day-set pattern; **no_pyramid_state_machine_violation_count must be 0 (vestigial under max_units=1 but still tracked for safety_zero)**
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C4: per-market RTH windows; eod_cancel == rth_close per market; LIMIT discipline; quote_age + spread checks
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C5: known_contract_rolls + known_expirations populated from CME calendar + Databento `definition` schema; blackout + LIMIT pre-close; unsupported-MOC detection
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C6: schema_id == sparta.external_research_hunter.s8_d1_cross_asset_donchian_no_pyramid_in_sample_diagnostic.v1; cagr from engine; win_rate literal when n<100; **per-market unit-count audit (must always be 0 or 1 under no-pyramid)**
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C7: closed enum {FAIL_SAFETY, INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE, READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST}; min_closed_trades=100; K-gates run in parallel; **no enum extension**
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C8: park-on-weak-performance rule; revival requires fresh s9-* candidate_record_id; live-block permanent; **no s8-D2 max_units=2 patch-up of this candidate**

citation_block:
# Inherits Phase 2 safety contracts (C1-C8) from:
#   docs/phase2_safety_contract_template.md  (sha 1812f4854a23e7a148257c88133042ea1e383725f4875e762475260ae3658981)
#   docs/phase2_safety_contract_template.json (sha 695a9fb6e0cb6ae5395d467471f2c55d3d90a7030443ca87e4c1d220335f4a32)
# Adapts each C-contract to s8-D1 specifics:
#   - canonical_record_id: s8-cross-asset-donchian-no-pyramid-nq-gc-zn-cl
#   - max_units_per_market = 1 (single delta from s7-D1)
#   - no-pyramid invariant; pyramid spacing vestigial
#   - portfolio cap structurally non-binding at 4 markets x 1 unit
#   - AMB6 filter NONE; cross-asset 4-market universe NQ/GC/ZN/CL
#   - Databento local cache reuse only; no fresh fetch
#   - in-sample 2013-01-01..2022-12-30; OOS noted but not inspected
# Does NOT revive any parked or rejected candidate (B005_001, NKE, D5, s7-D1).

fail_closed_when: LiveMode exception is missing, conditionally bypassed, or weakened
Any status string is reduced to anything other than PAUSED / BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES
Any broker / exchange / wallet / API-key adapter appears in imports
required_evidence: main.py Initialize block contains: if self.LiveMode: raise Exception('LIVE_PATH_DETECTED: s8-cross-asset-donchian-no-pyramid-nq-gc-zn-cl is paper-only forever; refuse to run in live mode.')
Local engine equivalent: if os.environ.get('LIVE_MODE') == '1' or any --live flag: raise the same exception.
Every diagnostic JSON output carries status_fields.trading_status == 'PAUSED'
Every diagnostic JSON output carries status_fields.live_status == 'BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES'
Every diagnostic JSON output carries status_fields.backtest_diagnostic_only == True
No file under external_research_hunter/s8_d1_cross_asset_donchian_no_pyramid_runner_harness/** imports broker/exchange adapters
C1_LiveMode_refusal.what_it_means_here: The s8-D1 runner (QC LEAN or local engine) MUST refuse to run in live mode. Both runtime paths are diagnostic-only. The runner does not import or instantiate any broker / exchange / Kraken / Binance / Alpaca adapter under any code path.

fail_closed_when: run_id hash inputs include any CONFIG-mutable date instead of engine date
Initialize cross-check is missing or bypassed
Engine EndDate > plan_lock_window_ceiling
report_seal_sha256 is missing OR is not byte-reproducible via external recompute

required_config_fields_for_future_runner.plan_doc_sha256: <computed at BUILD time as canonical seal of this phase2_plan.json>

fail_closed_when: Any hard safety counter > 0 at run end without an authoritative disposition
Any counter is mutated without a corresponding _forbidden_action_attempts or _skip_log entry
Per-minute increment used where per-day was intended
**per_market_unit_count_invariant_violation_count > 0**
**pyramid_state_machine_violation_count > 0 (specifically: any second-unit add attempt under max_units=1)**

futures_specific_counters.expiry_or_roll_fills_outside_rth_count: int; DISCLOSURE-ONLY. Engine-driven contract rollover or expiry-related fills outside RTH are not safety violations but are logged.
futures_specific_counters.n_calculation_drift_detected_count: int; counts cases where Wilder ATR(20) for a unit was recomputed from a different bar than the trigger bar. Must be 0 for safety_zero.
futures_specific_counters.non_rth_fill_warning_count: int; CME RTH-only filter at bar-derivation; a fill outside RTH is a safety violation. Tracked via tag classification. Must be 0 for safety_zero.
futures_specific_counters.per_market_unit_count_invariant_violatio: int; **S8-D1 SPECIFIC NEW COUNTER**: counts bars where any market's open-unit-count > 1. Under max_units_per_market=1, this MUST always be 0; non-zero = severe state-machine violation.
futures_specific_counters.pyramid_state_machine_violation_count: int; **S8-D1 ADAPTATION**: counts cases where unit-count > 1 (instead of >4 from s7-D1) OR pyramid second-unit trigger fires (impossible under max_units=1; if it does, that is a state-machine violation). Must be 0 for safety_zero.
futures_specific_counters.rollover_violation_count: int; counts positions held across an expiration boundary the runner did NOT explicitly roll. Must be 0 for safety_zero.
futures_specific_counters.unsupported_order_type_detected_count: int; for CME futures via QC, MarketOrder/LimitOrder/MarketOnOpen are supported; MarketOnClose typically supported for futures. Counter tracks any rejected order_type observed. Top-priority FAIL_SAFETY if > 0.

universal_counters.data_quality_warning_count: int; NaN, zero-volume, gap > 0.5% bars dropped + logged
universal_counters.session_boundary_warning_count: int; bar straddling RTH boundary; fail-closed

C4_rth_execution_discipline.boundary_alignment_rule: rth_safe_window_close == eod_cancel_time per market; misalignment is forbidden.
fail_closed_when: eod_cancel_time > rth_safe_window_close for any market
MarketOnClose order submitted for an opening unit
Non-RTH bars enter the Donchian channel computation
Wider RTH safe window than the asset's regular session is used
C4_rth_execution_discipline.limit_order_discipline: Opening orders MUST be LimitOrder OR market-on-next-open per spec entry_timing (ONO). MarketOnClose is forbidden for opens. Closing orders may be Market if the runner is operating at the session-close bar (matches spec exit_trigger fire-at-close + ONO exit).
required_checks_per_market_per_bar: Exchange.ExchangeOpen (or local-engine equivalent) == True for that market

fail_closed_when: Position held across an expiration the runner did not explicitly roll or pre-close
MarketOnClose submitted for a position close (must be LIMIT)
ex_date / roll_date hardcoded outside CONFIG
Blackout check skipped when known_events list is empty (must run the check as a no-op)
operator_responsibilities: Maintain known_contract_rolls and known_expirations current for 2013-2022 in-sample window
Source from CME group official calendar + Databento `definition` schema for each contract
Document the source and date of the event audit in the candidate's BUILD-time run preamble

required_config_fields_for_future_runner.known_contract_rolls: list[dict]; each: {market, roll_date_et, prior_contract, next_contract, stitch_method, modeled_cost_dollar}. Pre-populated from Databento `continuous` series metadata.
required_config_fields_for_future_runner.known_economic_event_blackouts: list[dict]; OPTIONAL: NFP/FOMC/CPI dates. If present, runner skips new entries on those dates (per-market basis).
required_config_fields_for_future_runner.known_expirations: list[dict]; each: {market, expiry_date_et, contract_code, delivery_type: 'cash'|'physical', notes}. Used to refuse a candidate whose tenor spans expiry.

fail_closed_when: schema_id silently bumped
win_rate emitted as a number when closed_trades_portfolio < verdict_min_closed_trades
cagr_pct computed from CONFIG dates
report_seal_sha256 missing or not byte-reproducible
max_units_observed_per_market_max > 1
second_unit_add_attempt_count > 0
performance_summary_required_fields_for_: cagr_pct (computed from engine StartDate/EndDate, NOT CONFIG)

C7_verdict_semantics.closed_enum_invariant: Enum is closed; no new verdict may be added without a fresh _revN_ spec.
fail_closed_when: A new verdict outside the closed enum is silently introduced
READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST is interpreted as live-ready in any downstream automation
Numeric win_rate emitted when n < threshold
C7_verdict_semantics.k_criteria_mapping_to_verdict_reasons: Per Tier-N spec rejection_gates K1..K12: even if VERDICT == READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST in the C7 enum, if K1/K2/K4/K6/K7/K8/K9/K10/K11/K12 fire, the candidate parks per Tier-N rejection_gates. C7 enum and Tier-N K-gates run in parallel; the candidate proceeds to OOS authorization ONLY if BOTH (VERDICT == READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST) AND (no K fires) AND (Tier-N acceptance gates A1..A10 all pass).
C7_verdict_semantics.never_means_live_ready: READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST is a research label only; 6-gate live-block applies regardless.
verdict_precedence_high_to_low: non_rth_fill_warning_count > 0 OR rollover_violation_count > 0 OR pyramid_state_machine_violation_count > 0 OR per_market_unit_count_invariant_violation_count > 0 OR n_calculation_drift_detected_count > 0 -> FAIL_SAFETY
(closed_trades_portfolio >= 100) AND (no safety counter fires) -> READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST (research label only; K-gates evaluated in parallel per Tier-N rejection_gates)

allowed_operational_statuses_for_s8_d1: READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST (after a clean P6 in-sample run + P7 memo)
REJECT_FAST (K12 fires; DR2/DR3/DR5 on cost-stress matrix)
fail_closed_when: Auto-revival of a parked candidate
Modification of a parked s8-D1 record to claim better economics
Parking used as a soft path to live promotion (live-block is permanent)
Threshold loosening or parameter iteration after seeing in-sample results (optimization, forbidden)
Re-running with max_units != 1 under the s8-D1 namespace (OI11 fires; requires fresh candidate_record_id)
permanent_attributes_unchanged_by_parkin: All advisory labels declared in Tier-N spec

transitions.revival: From any PARKED_*: requires a FRESH SEALED RESEARCH CYCLE under a NEW candidate_record_id (e.g. s9-* or later). Not a continuation of s8-D1. Old s8-D1 record stays parked permanently.

fail_closed_conditions_for_future_runner: Any C1 violation: LiveMode bypass / status string change / broker import
Any C2 violation: CONFIG/engine date divergence / window ceiling violation / seal recompute mismatch
Any C3 hard safety counter > 0 at run end (including new s8-D1 per_market_unit_count_invariant_violation_count > 0)
Any C4 violation: non-RTH bar in channel / MOC opens / eod_cancel misalignment
Any C5 violation: position held across expiry without explicit handling / MOC close where rejected
Any C6 violation: schema_id bump / cagr from CONFIG / win_rate as number when n<100 / missing seal / max_units_observed_per_market_max > 1 / second_unit_add_attempt_count > 0
Any C7 enum extension or live-ready interpretation
Any C8 weak-performance iteration / parking revival / threshold loosening / max_units != 1 re-run under s8-D1 namespace
Any K1..K12 fire from Tier-N rejection_gates
Any S-STOP-11 fire: max_units_per_market != 1 detected anywhere
Any S-STOP-12 fire: any s7-D1 chain artifact byte sha changes during s8-D1 turn
Any sealed parent sha drift detected mid-run
Any obsidian-trade-logger mutation, review_queue mutation, strategy_lab promotion
Any QC API call from the local-engine code path or vice versa

no_pyramid_mechanics_explicit_record.max_units_per_market_invariant: S-STOP-11 fires if max_units_per_market != 1 detected anywhere in CONFIG, runner constants, or runtime state.
no_pyramid_mechanics_explicit_record.n_calculation_source: Wilder ATR(20) of entry market at trigger bar (not fill bar); locked at unit entry; no re-use across pyramid units because no second unit exists

pre_flight_checklist_for_future_p6_in_sa: Verify all 14 s7-D1 chain artifacts byte-stable (S-STOP-12)
Verify databento local cache: 480 files / 129,789,451 bytes (s7-D1 P5 cache re-used)
Verify in_sample_driver.py byte sha matches BUILD-time recorded sha
Verify AMB6 filter NONE at runtime (no filter functions wired)
Verify obsidian-trade-logger tracked-file count and byte-total baseline preserved at run start
Verify operator P6 authorization line received (no auto-run)
what_future_p3_build_may_NOT_create: Any test artifact under tests/<runtime-output>/ (BUILD ONLY allows test scaffolding, NOT test execution)
Any strategy_lab approval or queue file
Any modification of existing s7-D1 runner harness files or any prior chain artifacts
Any Databento Historical client instantiation (db.Historical is forbidden in local-engine path)

files_in_runner_harness: main.py (QC LEAN entry; lazy QC import; LiveMode raise; CONFIG dict)
execution_guard.py (C1-C8 attestation runtime hooks; no broker imports)
in_sample_driver.py (local Databento DBN decoder + Donchian backtest; DIRECT REUSE of s7-D1 patched driver mechanic with max_units=1 CONFIG override)
